_note: Private trigger-only gate. It intentionally omits Carey-specific face geometry so the LoRA trigger must supply identity rather than the prompt.
template: masterpiece, best quality, solo head-and-shoulders portrait of careybh person, 1boy, adult Black man, neutral expression, direct eye contact, clean hand-drawn 2D anime, bold linework, flat cel shading, simple background
negative: photograph, photorealistic, semi-realistic, 3d, render, different person, generic replacement face, woman, child, pale skin, hat, glasses, exaggerated grin, distorted eyes, asymmetrical eyes, deformed face, duplicate, text, watermark, blurry

rubric.identity: 1-5 - does the trigger alone produce a face recognizably like Carey?
rubric.consistency: 1-5 - does identity survive checkpoint progression without becoming generic?
rubric.anime_quality: 1-5 - is the portrait clean, native 2D anime rather than a pasted photo?
